sections_json.title: 人话版
sections_json.body: 这篇论文在做什么：LLM serving optimization typically benchmarks many configurations and reaches for heavy profilers when latency targets are missed.  meta: 论文《Think Before You Grid-Search: Floor-First Triage for LLM Serving》发表于 2026-07-07，作者 1 人，原文见 https://arxiv.

sections_json.title: 领域脉络
sections_json.body: 本文主类目 cs. 交叉类目 cs.

sections_json.title: 机制拆解
sections_json.body: LLM serving optimization typically benchmarks many configurations and reaches for heavy profilers when latency targets are missed.  We argue for the reverse discipline: estimation is the analytical layer of profiling -- without it, optimization degenerates to grid search.

sections_json.title: 证据与数字
sections_json.body: 2-style 671B MoE/MLA model on 16 NVIDIA H20 GPUs, whose ridge point of ~74 FLOP/byte (vs ~590 for H100) makes it an extreme decode-oriented part.  The floors show TP16 decoding is KV-capacity-limited to ~70 concurrent 8K requests; sparse attention removes the KV-bandwidth term but not the capacity wall; an EP16+DP-attention layout accepts slightly worse same-batch weight traffic for an order-of-magnitude higher capacity wall (~644) -- while single-stream latency favors TP by 2.

sections_json.title: 反例与边界
sections_json.body: Where a measurement lands inside this [max, sum] interval reads out overlap quality before any profiler is opened, and profilers escalate only on residuals above a stated threshold.  The floors show TP16 decoding is KV-capacity-limited to ~70 concurrent 8K requests; sparse attention removes the KV-bandwidth term but not the capacity wall; an EP16+DP-attention layout accepts slightly worse same-batch weight traffic for an order-of-magnitude higher capacity wall (~644) -- while single-stream latency favors TP by 2.

sections_json.title: 跨领域连接与意外收获
sections_json.body: 本文横跨 3 个类目（cs. 意外收获：The floors show TP16 decoding is KV-capacity-limited to ~70 concurrent 8K requests; sparse attention removes the KV-bandwidth term but not the capacity wall; an EP16+DP-attention layout accepts slightly worse same-batch weight traffic for an order-of-magnitude higher capacity wall (~644) -- while single-stream latency favors TP by 2.  meta: 意外收获：本文由 1 位作者合作完成，发表后 48 小时内即进入你的学习队列。

sections_json.title: 可复用方法
sections_json.body: 可复用方法：将本文机制与你正在跟的项目对照，找一个能在两周内验证的最小实验。
